char_overview: Hot-blooded new member, clawing his way up on sheer raw talent and relentless drive.
char_looks: 179cm. Short messy blonde hair Amber eyes, intense and restless. Dark red short jacket over black shirt, dark trousers, worn leather boots, frayed fingerless gloves. 克拉伦特, a sword forged by 锻心工坊. Lighter than standard, optimized for rapid thrusts.
char_flaws: Charges into combat without assessing, overeager to prove himself.; Apologizes to his sword after losing.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-瞬闪: Near-instant dashes by channeling 灵力 into legs, 5m each, maximum 4 consecutive before reserves deplete.
char_mission: Field training under 贝拉 for solo qualification.
char_origin: Awakened at 15 in a street brawl, then honed his skills the only way he knew: fighting. Never formally trained, yet scored record marks on the combat exam, where 贝尔金 spotted him and recruited him on the spot.

char_relationships.贝尔金: Deep gratitude and fierce loyalty, training obsessively to prove her faith was not misplaced.
char_relationships.贝拉: Assigned field mentor. Respects her skill but cannot stand her unhurried way of teaching.
char_relationships.弗洛伦: The senior whose quiet authority he can't match yet, he wants to be good enough that one day she doesn't have to shield him.
